findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 33. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The PDF's complex multi-row header (with 'Report #', 'Lab', 'Dissolved', 'PQL', 'Units\Hg 1631' on separate sub-rows) is poorly flattened into a single header row. The third column header reads 'Report # Dissolved Units\Hg 1631', combining text from different header sub-rows that do not belong together. This column contains units (mg/L, ug/L, NTU) but the header text is misleading.
findings.evidence: PDF header sub-rows: 'Report #' (row 1), 'Lab Dissolved' (row 2), 'PQL Units\Hg 1631' (row 3). HTML header: <th>Report # Dissolved Units\Hg 1631</th> as a single merged header for the units column.
